title: nf-core/tres pipeline parameters
description: Repo-owned Nextflow DSL2 implementation of the TrES core RNA and DNA workflows

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Reserved nf-core schema placeholder. TrESFlow uses --samplesheet as the supported public input contract.

samplesheet.description: Hierarchical YAML samplesheet describing shared resources, biological groups, and modality-specific FASTQ inputs.

outdir.description: Output directory for published pipeline results and pipeline_info artifacts.

runtime_options.title: Runtime options
runtime_options.description: Pipeline runtime environment and repo-owned script locations.

runtime_env_prefix.description: Environment prefix that provides the required runtime executables and pinned Codon/Seq installation.

core_scripts_dir.description: Directory containing the vendored TrES core runtime scripts used by the local wrapper modules.

max_cpus.description: Maximum local CPU budget used to derive per-process scheduler reservations in the bundled local profiles.

publish_dir_mode.description: PublishDir mode applied by the lightweight modules.config layer.

config_profile_name.description: Optional human-readable active profile name used in reporting.

config_profile_description.description: Optional human-readable active profile description used in reporting.

custom_config_version.description: Version selector for remote nf-core/configs loading.

custom_config_base.description: Base URL used to load remote nf-core/configs institutional profiles.

resource_override_options.title: Resource overrides
resource_override_options.description: Optional CLI overrides for resources otherwise provided through the YAML samplesheet resources block.

ligation_barcode_whitelist.description: Ligation barcode whitelist used by RNA and DNA cell-barcode tagging.

rna_ref_base_dir.description: Reference base directory for RNA STARsolo alignment.

dna_bwa_reference.description: bwa-mem2 index prefix for DNA alignment.

dna_blacklist_bed.description: Blacklist BED file used during DNA alignment filtering.

dna_effective_genome_size.description: Effective genome size used for DNA coverage track generation.

advanced_options.title: Advanced options
advanced_options.description: Internal advanced defaults kept out of the main public YAML input contract.

barcode_defaults.description: Internal barcode parsing defaults used by the samplesheet parser and local wrapper modules.
